message:
fix(ux): Fix GC content display bug and add disabled button styling

## Bug Fixes

- **GC Content Bug (P0)**: Fixed GC content showing 4985.8% instead of 49.86%
  - QuickStats.tsx: Removed erroneous `* 100` multiplication
  - VirionStabilityOverlay.tsx: Same fix
  - Root cause: `gcContent` is already stored as a percentage (49.86) in the database,
    but the code was multiplying by 100 again
  - Discovered via Playwright testing of live production site

## UX Improvements

- **Disabled Button Styling**: Added proper styling for disabled ControlDeck buttons
  - Added `.tab-btn:disabled` styles with opacity: 0.4, cursor: not-allowed
  - Prevents browser default disabled styling from looking inconsistent
  - Applies to Prev/Next buttons when no phages are loaded

## Testing

- Verified build passes
- Playwright screenshots captured issues on phage-explorer.org

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,7 +55,7 @@ export function QuickStats({ className = '' }: QuickStatsProps): React.ReactElem {stats.gcContent != null && (
GC Content - {(stats.gcContent * 100).toFixed(1)}% + {stats.gcContent.toFixed(1)}%
)}
